title: remote manifest push: show copy progress
body:
`podman-remote manifest push` has shown absolutely no progress at all. Fix that by doing the same as the remote-push code does.

Like remote-push, `quiet` parameter is true by default for backwards compatibility.

Signed-off-by: Naoto Kobayashi <naoto.kobayashi4c@gmail.com>

Close #15210

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:

```release-note
Fix a bug where `podman-remote manifest push` would not print any progress.
```

comments.body:
Multiple build test failed with, I hope its an issue with image restarted tests.
```console
error creating build container: copying system image from manifest list: reading signatures: parsing signature https://access.redhat.com/webassets/docker/content/sigstore/ubi8-micro@sha256=ab815d2292d01d771c3d78c7a2efa400517e261da42c6d211d4ba45f83053cc5/signature-7: unrecognized signature format, starting with binary 0x3c
```

> Multiple build test failed with, I hope its an issue with image restarted tests.
> 
> ```
> error creating build container: copying system image from manifest list: reading signatures: parsing signature https://access.redhat.com/webassets/docker/content/sigstore/ubi8-micro@sha256=ab815d2292d01d771c3d78c7a2efa400517e261da42c6d211d4ba45f83053cc5/signature-7: unrecognized signature format, starting with binary 0x3c
> ```

We've seen them more frequently in the recent past. Cc: @edsantiago
